name: BatteryService
description: Simulates a Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) tracking State of Charge (SoC).

calculations.name: battery_dispatch
calculations.description: Calculates the actual power and new SoC based on network power allocation.

inputs.name: bess_allocation_w
inputs.description: Power requested from the network (Positive = Charge, Negative = Discharge)

outputs.name: actual_power_w
outputs.description: The actual power absorbed or injected after applying constraints

outputs.name: state_of_charge_wh
outputs.description: Current energy stored in the battery
